deployment.architecture: Deno edge proxy over the published GitHub Pages site

measureUserAgentSpecificMemory.note: The sample is evidence that the API executes on this deployment, not a stable site baseline. Model pages should report labelled before/after measurements and feature-detect support.

routingRegression.originalFailure: The first proxy allowlist rejected trailing-slash directory routes, so the homepage and assets worked while model and top-level subpages returned 404. The initial validation did not navigate a subpage and missed this.

browserProbe.honestCapabilityState: WebGPU unavailable in the validation browser; generation remained disabled with an accessible explanation.

console.warningExplanation: The validation browser had no usable WebGPU adapter; the page displayed the honest WASM fallback state.

method: Chrome DevTools MCP loaded the production homepage and SmolVLM subpage, inspected visible controls plus console and network requests, created a SharedArrayBuffer, passed it to a dedicated Worker, used Atomics to mutate/read shared memory across realms, imported AudioCapturePipeline to inspect its selected transport, and awaited performance.measureUserAgentSpecificMemory(). A separate bounded production probe checked all 293 built model index routes plus explore, architecture, and image-credits.
